programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.desc: Teams in Paris, France, must whip up some tasty treats and make enough Chantilly cream for four pies, as well as compete in a series of carnival games.

programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Tight fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Helen Foley finds a strange and very serious little girl on the stairs outside her apartment. The little girl seems to know her, and tries to jog her memory about a man she saw earlier that day. The man arrives at Helen's door…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When the group learns that someone dangerous may be loose near the farm, Rick, Shane, Daryl and Glenn try to keep everyone safe; Shane's antagonism grows and Carl faces the consequences of his actions.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and Carl find the farm in jeopardy; the group is split up in the chaos; Rick's leadership is questioned.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the world grows more dangerous and Lori's pregnancy advances, Rick locates a potentially safe haven.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A medical emergency proves traumatic and leaves a life hanging in the balance; Rick and the group discover a potential threat to their new surroundings.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea and Michonne witness an accident that leads them to a new group of survivors, but when tensions arise with their new acquaintances, they must make a decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group becomes severed, putting lives in jeopardy; in Woodbury, Merle approaches the Governor to make a request.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick struggles after another loss; Michonne grows more suspicious of the Governor, who throws a party for the people of Woodbury.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea and the Governor grow closer while Michonne makes a decision about Woodbury; Glenn and Maggie go on a run; Rick struggles with grief.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A new guest at the prison forces Rick's hand; members of the group go on a mission to rescue Glenn and Maggie; the Governor presses for information.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea steps up when the people of Woodbury are thrown into uncharted territory; a new threat arises at the prison.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick tries to save one of his group; Woodbury is in disarray; new guests at the prison raise concerns.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group debates the next step; Rick searches for a lost friend; Daryl and Merle question their choices; the Governor restores order.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they're running out of supplies, the group must make a choice when security is threatened; Andrea goes to the prison to attempt a negotiation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they are outgunned, Rick leads an expedition to get more weapons and fortify their group against the Governor and his forces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the Governor convene for a tense negotiation of a peace treaty between their respective groups, hoping to prevent more deaths.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Governor chases a fleeing dissenter; while the Governor is gone, a traitor tries to sabotage his plans.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn le revela a todo el grupo el secreto del granero, pero no están de acuerdo sobre cómo actuar: Rick ordena respetar la autoridad de Hershel, aunque Shane quiere acabar con los zombis. Por otra parte, descubren por fin qué le ha pasado a Sophia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hershel no soporta lo ocurrido y recae en su alcoholismo, pero Rick y Glenn lo siguen hasta la ciudad para evitar que muera. Entretanto, Beth, incapaz de aceptar todo lo que le está sucediendo a su familia, entra en estado catatónico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Lori sale en busca de Rick, pero lo único que encuentra es un peligro mortal y Shane va tras ella. Entretanto, Rick, Hershel y Glenn mantienen un tiroteo con los desconocidos con quienes cruzaron sus caminos en el bar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La tensión entre Rick y Shane aumenta y la decisión sobre el destino de Randall es el detonante: Shane quiere matarlo, Rick prefiere dejarlo vivo. Mientras, Beth pretende suicidarse y Andrea, quien debe vigilarla, no cumple con su cometido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre que Randall es un violador y asesino y acuerdan ejecutarlo, pero Dale se opone porque eso los convertiría también en criminales. Mientras tanto, Carl comete un error que acarreará consecuencias imprevistas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las diferencias entre Rick y Shane por el liderato del grupo y la gestión de la granja se intensifican cuando Shane decide por su cuenta el destino de Randall. La tensión termina estallando y los dos amigos se enfrentan a muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una horda de zombis invade la granja y el grupo intenta escapar vivo entre el caos, pero no todos lo lograrán. Además, Rick se harta de las quejas del grupo y les da un ultimátum: si quieren que sea el líder, acatarán sus órdenes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra refugio en las instalaciones de una prisión federal abandonada tras meses en la carretera. Rick considera que se trata de un lugar seguro para que Lori pase los últimos meses de embarazo, pero quizá se haya equivocado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick accede a dejar salir de sus celdas a los prisioneros si les ayudan a matar a los zombis que quedan en la prisión. Entretanto, la salud de Hershel empeora por momentos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea y Michonne descubren una comunidad de sobrevivientes liderada por un hombre llamado el Gobernador. Allá les ofrecen medicinas, comida, agua caliente y ropa limpia, pero Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y sus verdaderas intenciones.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Woodbury, Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y planea irse sin Andrea. En la prisión, un sabotaje provoca que una horda de zombis penetre en la cárcel y, mientras Rick y sus compañeros los combaten, Lori entra en trabajo de parto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick está totalmente abatido por la muerte de Lori, pero recibe una llamada telefónica sorprendente. Entretanto, Michonne ha descubierto el secreto del Gobernador y se dispone a abandonar Woodbury, a pesar de que Andrea quiere permanecer allá.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne ve a Glenn y Maggie buscando provisiones, pero alguien más los observa: Merle, quien reconoce a Glenn como uno de los que le abandonó, a merced de los zombis, en una azotea de Atlanta. Entretanto, Rick sigue mentalmente inestable.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne conduce a Rick, Daryl y Oscar a Woodbury para rescatar a Glenn y Maggie, a quienes el Gobernador está torturando para sonsacarles dónde se oculta el grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick invade Woodbury con la intención de rescatar a Glenn y Maggie. Michonne descubre el secreto familiar que oculta el Gobernador cuando trata de asesinarlo. En la prisión, un grupo desconocido atraviesa la verja de seguridad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de la batalla contra el Gobernador, Rick y Carl encuentran una casa en la que Rick intenta reponerse de sus graves heridas y Carl sale en busca de alimentos. Mientras, Michonne trata de encontrarlos.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A villainous art collector masterminds a plot to turn agent James West against the Secret Service.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon battle an assortment of characters to extradite a Bosnian Nobleman back to his homeland to face trial.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James West and Artemus Gordon join a wagon train of entertainers in their search for a mysterious assassin.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An over-ambitious general plans to rise to the presidency of the U.S. because of his reputation as a ruthless Indian fighter.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon work to avert the destruction of the American Cotton industry.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon struggle to bring to justice a weirdly garbed, artillery-equipped gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Former inmates of a Civil War prison camp seek revenge against the camp commandant because of his alleged atrocities against them.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A murderer trapped by agent James T. West breaks out of prison with a bizarre plan to assassinate him.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is attacked while guarding a precious cargo of smallpox vaccine and loses his memory from a blow on the head.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter voodoo rites and a diabolical biologist and his throng of robot-like slaves.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon face a killer beast and a mystery guarded by a senator and his three sons.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A would-be dictator's attempt to assassinate President Ulysses S. Grant brings him up against secret agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A double-dealing foreign diplomat attempts to implicate the United States in an international conspiracy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are determined to foil an ex-army general's plan to gain possession of a secret explosive formula.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard revisits a homeowner to repair a water heater. Tom installs a storm door with a dog in mind. And home technology expert Ross Trethewey looks at voice-activated smart devices.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard describes the dangers of CO2. Tom and Kevin build a home message center. The guys ask “What Is It?” Scott replaces track lighting. Jenn walks through the inspiration for a landscape design.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner improve her drinking water with a whole house filter. Jenn creates a backyard sanctuary with a patio and fire pit. Tom explains the differences between soft and hard wood.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott heads to Alaska to hook up a portable generator powering an entire house. Tom repairs a poorly installed piece of wood floor nosing. Richard gives an inside look at dishwasher cycles.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard uses cameras to locate a drain problem. Scott warms up a chilly bathroom, installing an electric convection heater. Mauro demonstrates a masking primer that leaves clean lines on a window.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin create a planter box in Build It. Ross Trethewey features a tablet attachment that makes 3D scans of home interiors in Future House. Scott explains the need for surge protection.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn plants a rain garden to keep runoff and waste out of marshlands. Scott brightens up a bedroom with new overhead lighting. Tom gives tips on installing cabinets accurately and consistently.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom learns how to create a unique keepsake box from island materials in Build It. Richard looks at a new way to store solar energy. Roger helps a family grow an organic garden.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard visits the Grand Canyon, then helps a homeowner with a new type of water softener. Ross demonstrates a home organization app. Tom builds a shadow box using wood from a salvaged door.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom teaches a young fan how to build a tool box. Scott installs smart smoke and carbon monoxide detectors; Richard installs an expansion tank to fix a leaking temperature and pressure relief valve.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom teaches a homeowner a simple tiling technique; Richard demonstrates a wireless leak detector that prevents floods; Jenn installs a water feature that collects and reuses rainwater.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger reseeds a dead section of lawn to blend it in with the rest of the yard; Richard shows the basics of toilet changing; Ross visits an off-the-grid home that’s testing commercial HVAC equipment.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The abandoned Seaside Victorian Cottage is restored to its original beauty. A new addition matches the existing architectural details. New hardscape and landscape anchor it to the corner lot.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The show returns to Dorchester, MA, the home of the first This Old House project, to follow the renovation of a triple decker that burned from illegal fireworks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Asbestos is removed from exposed ductwork. Richard meets the new plumber. Jenn visits a community garden. A local historian speaks about triple deckers. Tom and Charlie pull off the melted siding.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The back porches are brought to code. Ice blasting is used to get rid of the fire odor. New vinyl siding gets installed. Homeowner Carol considers new accent colors to match. Framing begins inside.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn creates a patio building team. Heath rewires a section with intact plaster. Charlie and Tom hang a fire rated door. Richard explains how a tub fits in. Kevin and Tom install a replacement window.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom works with new apprentices. Kevin meets them and learns about YouthBuild. Homeowner Carol looks at kitchen cabinets and counters. Richard works with James on separate HVAC systems.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mauro works with the apprentices to fix plaster damage. Richard meets plumber Ronnette about the new sprinkler system. Carol and her sister shop for tile. The glass doors get repaired by an expert.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin reinstall cabinets that survived the fire. Tom teaches apprentices to trim a window. HVAC contractor James shows Richard the plan for hot water. Carol and her sister shop for appliances.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices attend a roofing class and then put their skills to practice. Back at the triple decker, a vinyl floor goes in. Mauro touches up the cabinets. Tom and Charlie install French doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Well over a year and a half since the fire, the triple decker is just about ready for the homeowners to return. Kevin O'Connor checks out what's left to do in all three units, both inside and out.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miami's Sweet Heat: Laurie and Lindsey demand a title shot and call out The Mother Truckers to defend their gold in the Main Event. Ariel Sky fights for a way back into Coach Campanelli's good graces, but will Ariel's status as a wrestler be revoked?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones proves she will go to any lengths to deter her former teammate the All American Girl, Americana, from success. Siren the Voodoo Doll is back!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Samantha Smart is seemingly willing to do anything to get her IQ Superior team of Classmaster and the Disciplinarian to the top as they make a challenge for the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Boss Adriana Gambino makes her way to the ring in style to deal with Princess Aussie.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Former WOW World Champion Santana Garrett gets emotional as she recounts her long journey back to WOW and why this road back means so much.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ariel Sky fights for her freedom against her former trainer Coach Campanelli in the high stakes Freedom Match. Will Ariel be able to decide her own fate and prove her worth, or will Coach Campanelli continue pulling the strings?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's the high-flying debut of the bahamian beauty Sierra Breeze as she must battle Penelope Pink.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Newly crowned WOW World Champion: The Beast has finally established that she's the top of the WOW roster, but with so many predators on the hunt for gold, how long can she hold on?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Following The Brat Pack's vicious turn on one of their own Lil J Boogie, Stephy Slays teams up to help Lil J Boogie stand up to her bullies in the ring. Reina Del Rey goes head to head with Tormenta in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Siren the Voodoo Doll and Chainsaw are sent into the ring by Angelica Dante to battle the sunny Spring Break 24/7's Crystal Waters and Sandy Shore. In the Main Event, Princess Aussie clashes with fellow Australian, Superhero Genesis.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The unrelenting team of Top Tier starts the night facing The Dojo Defenders who have recruited Sierra Breeze. The All American Girls are back in the ring battling Las Bandidas. In a Main Event, reigning champion The Beast takes on The Classmaster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's an action packed opening match as former champion Penelope Pink battles Tiki Chamorro. Lil J-Boogie makes her way as a singles competitor against Ice Cold. Lana Star's Fabulous Four take on The Tonga Twins in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Samantha Smart assures her team of The Classmaster and The Disciplinarian are ready to challenge The Mother Truckers for their championship in the Main Event. The All American Girls and Ariel Sky set out to beat their bullies in the ring.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Millionaire Jack Vandergelt III hires Bret to trade places with him so he's free to woo the lovely Lydia Linley. All goes well with the plan, at first…

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: A rancher petitions Bret for help in frustrating a blossoming romance between his daughter and a good-for-nothing gunslinger. CLINT EASTWOOD guest stars.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: After he loses all his money in a bank robbery, Bart signs on with a beautiful blonde con woman as her cattle drive boss. ROBERT CONRAD guest stars.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret and Waco Williams encounter trouble when they are suspected of rustling cattle and find themselves mediating between homesteaders and cattlemen.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunslinger Jake Hoyt plots a radical means of rising to power in Tombstone -- by snatching the sheriff's job away from Clay Hollister. To succeed, Hoyt plans to outshine Hollister as a sharpshooter. The result is inevitable: a dramatic showdown.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: While the survivors of an Indian attack dig the victim's grave, they discover a vein of silver. The strike ignites a wrathful dispute between the two prospectors and the dead man's kinfolk over shares of ownership of the new-found fortune.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister is taken prisoner by a trio of fugitives who need him as a guide on their escape route to Mexico. Left with his guns but no bullets, the sheriff searches desperately for a means of escape and must make a last-ditch gamble for survival.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: An enraged Apache bravely kills the white man who murdered his father. Both Sheriff Hollister and the victim's brother pursue the Indian -- with very different goals -- and trap him in a box canyon that the Apache has rigged with dynamite.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunman Nate Crandall murders a rancher to steal $20,000. Sheriff Hollister gets to the loot first and locks it in a safe. Determined to get the money, Crandall involves young Jim Edwards in a plot to rob the safe and take the fall for the killing.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Reverend Tuttle is aboard the stagecoach when it is robbed by three masked gunmen. Sheriff Hollister suspects Big Jim Sten, boss of a nearby town, is behind the robbery. But when the reverend and Hollister visit Sten's town, a secret is revealed.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Jett Sergeant, son of a notorious outlaw, sees Hollister kill his father in a shootout and vows he will kill the Sheriff. Clay tries to set him straight, but the youth teams up with two of his father's henchmen in a plot a murder the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, Frank Leslie returns to Tombstone to marry the widow of the man he killed and pledges never to use guns again. But four brothers of Leslie's victim come to Tombstone intent on revenge, putting his oath to the test.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Prepare for a feathered fight when Téa squares off against Big 2 Crump's Nightmare Penguin where the loser will be trapped forever in a block of ice!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa's body turns more and more into a giant popsicle, can she keep her brain from freezing to find a way to melt Big 2's strategy? Or will Big 2's penguin horde waddle all over her?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the judicial jerk Big 3 Johnson who takes the Deck Master form of Judge Man! How can Joey defeat a foe who can destroy Joey's monsters at will?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Just when Joey seems to gain the upper hand, he hits the longest streak of bad luck in the history of mankind! Has Joey's fortunes finally run out, or is a crooked judge ignoring the rules of the law?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 4 Nezbitt challenges Duke, Tristan, and Serenity for the right to gain control of three bodies at once! Will Serenity's errors cost her team the ultimate price when Tristan and Duke can't cover for her mistakes?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: One down, two to go! With the loss of Tristan, Serenity is heartbroken. Can she pull herself together and remember the lessons Tristan taught her to turn the duel around?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan's back... but he's not who he appears to be when he kidnaps Mokuba! It's time for Kaiba to stop monkeying around and rescue his brother, but he's confronted by Big 5 Leichter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 5's Satellite Cannon attacks Kaiba's monsters from deep space! Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba inspires him to believe that his brother will pull out the victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba arrives at Noah's sanctuary to rescue Mokuba, but Mokuba wants to stay with Noah! Has Mokuba seen the evil within Kaiba, or is something more sinister in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah gives the Big Five one last chance to redeem themselves in a five-on-two tag team duel where Yugi and Joey take on the entire Big Five!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five concentrate their attack on Joey so that Yugi would be forced to duel all alone! Outmanned and overpowered, Yugi and Joey are near the end of the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five summon an almighty dragon that previously defeated Joey, Mai, and Mokuba! Joey and Yugi pull out all the stops, but is that enough to avoid their minds being scattered over virtual reality?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a duel for control of KaibaCorp when Noah squares off against Kaiba! But can Kaiba fight at full strength after he learns the hidden truth about Noah... and the tragic past that made him what he is today?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark steals monsters into its keep to use as an impenetrable wall of servants! How can Kaiba hurt Noah when Noah has an endless stream of monsters to protect himself with?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's about to finish Noah, but Mokuba protects Noah from his final blow! Will Kaiba sacrifice his beloved brother in exchange for freedom, or will the brotherly bond remain unbreakable?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: For every turn that passes, one of Yugi's friends is transformed into stone! As more and more of his friends harden into solid rock, can Yugi defeat Noah before he runs out of turns and transforms into stone himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are petrified into solid stone statues, but their spirits live on! Their combined souls energize Yugi into a noble fight, but is spirit going to win the duel when Yugi's not drawing the right cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has defeated Noah... but they still can't escape from the virtual world! The real reason behind their entrapment is revealed... as is the true villain pulling the strings!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba squares off against his stepfather Gozaburo for their final battle, Yugi and friends are attacked by endless hordes of monsters! Their only hope is Noah, but they can't expect help from their enemy... can they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Time is almost up before the missile's explosion destroys Yugi and friends! Will the Battle City finalists beat the clock and live to duel another day in the stunning conclusion to the virtual world saga!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends arrive at KaibaCorp Island where the Battle City finalists will compete in the ultimate dueling arena! Get ready for the awesome four-person battle royal where any duelist can attack anyone else!
